project.objective: Identify the parents of Job Purnell (b. ~1826, Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England; married Serena Deacon 1849) — no parentage records gathered yet; a baptism search is planned

questions.question: Who were the parents of Job Purnell (b. ~1826, Trowbridge, Wiltshire)?
questions.rationale: Primary objective. Job is well anchored as an adult (Trowbridge, married Serena Deacon 1849, son Samuel b.1850); his parents are not yet identified. A parish baptism ~1826 would name them.

items.rationale: A parish baptism/christening around 1826 in Trowbridge would name Job's father and mother.
